pr-evidence/readme-engine-adapter-payloa.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewed the diff, ran the focused README governance test, checked the README imports against public exports, and approved with no findings.
scope: README serving-engine adapter handoff documentation and project-governance README regression tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py::test_readme_engine_adapter_handoff_example_uses_public_payload_reader tests/test_project_governance.py::test_readme_documents_cachet_brand_and_scope -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py -q; python -m compileall -q src/document_kv_cache src/restaurant_kv_serving; git diff --check; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Updated the README serving-engine handoff example to use the public read_engine_adapter_payload helper and added a governance test that parses the README code fence and verifies imported document_kv_cache names are public exports.
pr-evidence/readme-engine-adapter-payloa.why: The generalized package should give vLLM/SGLang connector authors a concrete, package-owned payload-loading boundary instead of an undefined adapter_storage placeholder.
